title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spar India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spar India
jsonLd.description:
We at Spar India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!
